title: Hollow Signal
description:
The Broadcast Wants You Silent

Something has corrupted the transmission, and it's growing louder with every second you stay alive. You're not exploring a story here — you're fighting to survive one signal at a time, watching the pressure escalate wave after wave until the static itself feels like a countdown. Every run is a battle against a broadcast that refuses to let you go.

Choose Your Hunter, Choose Your Fight

No two hunters play the same. Each one carries a distinct identity and combat style, so the way you push through the corruption is yours to define. Whether you favor speed, brute force, or precision, your hunter becomes the lens through which the nightmare unfolds.

Evolve Your Arsenal Mid-Run

Fragments drop, weapons upgrade, modifiers stack — and suddenly the gun you started with isn't the gun tearing through Apex Brood twenty minutes later. Every fragment collected is a small promise that your build is about to hit different, and that promise is what keeps you pushing one more wave deeper into the transmission.

The Pressure Never Stops Rising

This isn't a fight that lets you settle into a rhythm. Dynamic Threat Escalation means the horde thickens, the corrupted combat events intensify, and the signal-born bosses arrive right when you think you've found your footing. Apex Brood and the other transmission threats don't wait for you to be ready.

Built for the Run You Do Tonight

Hollow Signal is designed to fit into the pocket of time you actually have. Runs are lightweight and arcade-fast, so 'just one more try' is never a lie you're telling yourself — it's true, and it's already loading.

Add Hollow Signal to your Wishlist now — because when the transmission finally goes live, you'll want to be the first to answer it.

Features:

• Fight through fast, escalating horde combat built for pure adrenaline

• Master multiple hunters, each with a distinct feel and playstyle

• Evolve your loadout mid-run with weapon upgrades and stacking modifiers

• Face signal-born bosses like Apex Brood when the pressure peaks

• Jump into lightweight arcade runs perfect for one more try

Survive the Corruption. Silence the Signal
description_short: The signal is corrupted. Something is listening. Pick a hunter, load your weapons, and survive the broadcast before it silences you.
